name: Shogi Knight
name_jp: ラインモンスター <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｋ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ケイ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ホース
desc: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zone; reveal that target, then destroy it if it is a Trap Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position. When you destroy a Trap Card by this effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 EARTH monster from your hand in face-up Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zone; reveal that target, then destroy it if it is a Trap Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position. When you destroy a Trap Card by this effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 EARTH monster from your hand in face-up Defense Position.
eff: When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Card Zone; reveal that target, then destroy it if it is a Trap Card. Otherwise, return it to its original position. When you destroy a Trap Card by this effect: You can Special Summon 1 Level 3 EARTH monster from your hand in face-up Defense Position.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
